channel.title: Clearforge Features
channel.description: Long-form practical AI analysis from Clearforge.

item.title: AI’s next real upgrade is not bigger models. It’s better voice and better judgment.
item.description: An analysis of OpenAI’s GPT‑Live voice update, its warning about shaky coding benchmarks, and Microsoft’s new research cohort on AI and work—showing why the next phase of AI is about usability and evidence, not bigger model hype.
